meaning: Bavarian Motor Works,德国宝马汽车公司
examples: No surprise, then, that they are most often found in luxury cars, like Lexus, BMW and Audi.
Mercedes and BMW have enjoyed the best margins in the business, but they have lost lots of money on their small cars.
Mercedes-Benz reported that its sales fell 11.2%. BMW cut back in shipments from Germany to the U.S. as it saw sales decline 15.2%.
Mr Broadhurst, 34, was killed while checking a BMW car which he suspected had been stolen.
The force said the BMW driver chased the motorcyclist after he was shot at.
